titleStmt.title: SII 26.510: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 510. (A.R. No. 483 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Dharmapperumāḷ Kulaśēkharadēva: Śaka 1483 and 13th year, Durmati Varshā-ṛitu, Kanni (Puraṭṭāśi) 19, śu. 10, Thursday, Uttirāḍam = 1561 A.D., September 18.

summary.p: This inscription records that on the orders of the prince Aḻagaṉ perumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṉ, a certain Ūruḍaiya-mudali alias Vīrapāṇḍi Sūḍikkoḍutta-mudali, the māḍāpattiyam (manager) of the temple of the god Tiruvālaivāyuḍaiyār of Māḍaikuḷattukkīḻ Madurai in Madurai udaiya-vaḷanāḍu, was appointed as the temple accountant of the temple of the god Vīrapāṇḍīśvara of the place (name not mentioned), and he was given the right to enjoy (kāṇiyātchi) of the land one mā in extent in Muḍiviḷaṅgupāṇḍyaṉ-kuḷappaṟṟu in Śōlaiśēri in Āṇmarai-nāḍu, that went with the appointment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ādicaṇḍeśvarājyeyam . ḷaitattrailokyanemmāṇa trāṇa samhārakāraṇam śāsanam śāśvatam śambhorvikrampāṇiśvarasya kāraṇam śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 3ṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa nam kumāran taṉmaip perumāḷ kulacekaratevaṟku
yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu tuṉmativaruṣattu dakṣiṇāyanattu varṣa ṛtu kanniravi 10 9 teyatiyum śuüpakṣattu daśamiyum brahaspativāramum sukanmayogamum ṛbhabhakaraṇamum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ nam kumāran tanmap perumāḷ kulaśekhara devatnanarāna
Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉ nammālaiyattil tāṉikar kaṇakkaṟku Olaivarak kāṭṭukaiyil maturai Utaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭaikkuḷattiṉkkiḻ maturaiyil tiruvālaivāyuṭaiyār koyilil māṭāpattiyam Ūruṭaiya mutaliyāṉa virapāṇṭi
cūṭikkuṭutta mutalikku nammālayattuc cīpaṇṭārakkaṇakkuk kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak koṭutta nilam Orumāvukku Āṇmaraināṭṭu colaiceri muṭiviḷaṅku pāṇṭiyaṉ kuḷappaṟṟil nilam Orumā Iṉṉilam Oru māvum mātam Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭu
koṭṭai nellum Iraṇṭu paṇam nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi coṟum maṟṟum Acal kaṇakkukkotta cumantiraṅkaḷum paṟṟikkoṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Ācandratāravat san=tati praveśam cempiluñ kilaiyilum veṭṭikkaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum Ādicaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.510 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
